docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-28-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-28-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELAROSA, VICTORIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ARONS, BEN THE EVIDENCE WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH AN AGREEMENT FOR THE THREE MONTHS SPECIFIED. PLAINTIFF DID NOT OFER EVIDENCE OF THE AMOUNT OF ANY UNPAID UTILITIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,520.00 FILED BY DELAROSA, VICTORIA AS TO DEFENDANT ARONS, BEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-14-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-01-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ARONS, BEN
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-28-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-14-2010 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-28-2010 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAROSA, VICTORIA
